code:
let rows = [[1, 2, 3], [4, 5, 6], [7, 8, 9]]
mut total = 0
mut i = 0
while i < rows.len()
  let row = rows.get(i)
  match row
  when Some(r)
    mut j = 0
    while j < r.len()
      match r.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        total = total + v
      when None
        total = total
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
  when None
    total = total
  end
  i = i + 1
end
print("total=#{total}")
